message:
Fix fifth review issues: missing imports and CLI implementation

- processor.ts: Add ToolCall, TranscriptSection imports
- timeline.tsx: Add cn import, make onSelectMessage optional
- message-detail.tsx: Add cn, ToolCall, detectLanguage, MessageContent imports
- stats-dashboard.tsx: Add cn import
- page.tsx: Add TimelineSkeleton, InsightCard imports
- jfp.ts: Add complete CLI implementation with:
  - Proper imports (fs, path, os, chalk)
  - Argument parsing (parseFlags function)
  - All command implementations (list, search, show, copy, install,
    uninstall, installed, update, interactive)
  - Main entry point with process.argv handling
  - showQuickStart and showHelp functions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
